steps.title: Identify where costs decreased most
steps.content: The passage states that decreased costs were “most significant in the manufacturing and distribution process,” which happens after authoring, editing, and design. This distinction directly signals that the earlier stages experienced less significant cost reductions.

steps.title: Find what logically follows
steps.content:
Choice D — the costs of writing, editing, and designing a book were less affected by the technologies used than were the costs of manufacturing and distributing a book. directly follows from the comparison: if manufacturing and distribution experienced the most significant cost reductions, then the earlier stages must have been less affected.

The alternatives introduce topics the passage never addresses.

That matches Choice D — the costs of writing, editing, and designing a book were less affected by the technologies used than were the costs of manufacturing and distributing a book..
